statement: Organizers of events should be able to make a request for a vaccination certificate upon entry.
The Netherlands should make its exit from the European Union (EU).
During the upcoming New Year's Eve, it should be given permission to set off decorative fireworks again.
There should be an additional tax on making a purchase of meat.
The government should effect the abolition of the ban on face-covering clothing.
The national government, rather than provinces and municipalities, should make a decision where new residential areas are built.
The government should make reductions in the VAT on cultural activities to 5 percent.
The Netherlands should effect the construction of a new nuclear power plant.
The Dutch government should make an apology for the historical slave trade.
Primary school teachers should have earnings as much as secondary school teachers.
The Netherlands should effect the introduction of an additional flight tax for short-distance flights.
Asylum seekers with a temporary residence permit should effect the completion of integration before getting a rental home.
Both the purchase and sale of soft drugs by coffee shops should be given legal authorization.
An increase in minimum wages should no longer automatically give rise to an increase in welfare benefits.
New residential areas should have a proportion of at least 40 percent green space.
The Netherlands should effect the acceptance of more refugees than it currently does.
Limiting rights and freedoms is necessary to take up the fight against organized crime.
It should be easier for companies to effect the dismissal of workers.
The state should take measures to effect the redistribution of wealth from the rich to the poor.
The government must effect an increase in spending on public health care, even if this means increasing taxes.
The working day should be given a reduction without reducing workers' wages.
Governments should make as few interventions in the economy as possible.
Taxes on fossil fuels must be raised to effect the financing of the Green Transition.
The future Spanish government should effect an increase in irrigated agricultural areas by means of large water transfers.
To better defend Spain's interests in Europe we must effect the recovery of more sovereignty.
The Spanish government should give a boost to the strengthening of NATO in Europe.
The best way to solve the conflict in Catalonia is for its citizens to be able to cast a vote on their future in a referendum.
Negotiating with pro-independence supporters effects a weakening of the State.
The right to self-determination must be given recognition by the Constitution.
The policies of linguistic immersion in the native language of bilingual Autonomous Communities have a detrimental effect on Spanish.
It is necessary to effect the repeal of the Law of Democratic Memory passed during this legislature.
Immigrants should make payments for their own health services.
A general speed limit is to take effect across all highways.
Germany is to effect an increase in its defense spending.
Young people over the age of 16 are to be granted permission to vote in Bundestag elections.
The ability of landlords to increase housing rents is to be given stricter restrictions by law.
All employed persons are to be given requirement for being insured in the statutory pension scheme.
The traditional family of father, mother and children is to be given a stronger boost than other living arrangements.
Donations from companies to political parties should continue to be given permission.
The Nord Stream 2 Baltic Sea pipeline, which transports gas from Russia to Germany, is to be given permission to go into operation as planned.
Female civil servants are to be given permission to wear headscarves while on duty.
The federal government is to make provision for more financial support for projects to combat anti-Semitism.
Chinese companies should not be given permission to receive contracts for the expansion of the communications infrastructure in Germany.
The state should continue to effect the collection of church tax for religious communities.
The controlled sale of cannabis is to be given general approval.
Germany is to make its exit from the European Union.
Facial recognition software should be given permission to be used for video surveillance in public places.
Organic agriculture should be given a stronger boost than conventional agriculture.
Islamic associations are to be given recognition by the state as religious communities.
The statutory minimum wage is to be given an increase to at least 12 euros by 2022 at the latest.
Air traffic is to be given heavier taxation.
Companies are to make decision for themselves whether to allow their employees to work from home.
Social transfers should be given an increase to reduce the effects of inflation on citizens.
The state should give funding for private visits to specialists if the waiting time at a public facility exceeds three months.
The state should make provision for a free nursery place for every child.
Schools should have more freedom to make a choice of the content covered in the curriculum.
The state should effect the construction of low-rent apartments for rent.
Taxes should be given an increase for top earners.
All entrepreneurs should make payment of the same health premium regardless of income.
Poland should effect the adoption of the migrant relocation solutions adopted by the European Union.
The share of defense spending in Poland's GDP should be given a further increase.
The powers of local governments should be given an increase at the expense of the central government.
Public media funding from the state budget should be given restrictions.
The powers of the secret services to track the activities of citizens on the Internet should be given restrictions.
The EU's rule of law mechanism makes threats against Hungary's sovereignty.
Hungarian foreign policy should be given guidance solely by Hungarian economic interests.
Hungary should make a decision by referendum whether to remain part of the EU.
The age of compulsory schooling should be given an increase back to 18.
Education spending should be given an increase to at least the OECD average of 5.2 per cent (GDP).
Teachers' salaries should be given a twofold increase.
Political influence has been given a reduction by changing the university model (reorganisation into a trust).
Only men and women should be given permission to marry.
The state should take targeted measures to give a boost to equal participation of fathers and mothers in child-rearing.
The Hungarian government should give ratification to the Istanbul Convention, which combats violence against women and domestic violence.
One effective way to make reductions in rents is to conclude favourable gas supply contracts with Russia.
Give an increase in the contribution of the wealthier to the public purse (abolition of the one-band tax).
A price freeze on some basic foodstuffs (e.g. chicken tail, milk) is the right step to take up the fight against inflation.
The current three-month unemployment benefit should be given an extension.
A family tax credit is a better way to give support to families than increasing the family allowance.
It is right that it is the Education Office, rather than parents and kindergarten teachers, that makes a decision on the school entry maturity of children over the age of six.
The use of medical cannabis should be given legal authorization in Hungary.
Polluting companies should be given heavier taxation.
In larger cities, car traffic should be given restrictions through various measures (P+R parking, construction of cycle paths, improvement of public transport).
The redevelopment of urban green spaces (e.g. the Liget project in Budapest) has a need for a broad social dialogue.
European economic integration has gone too far: member states should effect the regaining of more autonomy.
Citizens should be given a guarantee of freedom of choice in end-of-life matters (euthanasia).
Recreational use of marijuana/cannabis should be given permission.
A law is needed to effect the prevention of companies' relocating their production abroad.
Businesses should be able to effect the dismissal of employees more easily.
The introduction of a single income tax rate ("flat tax") would have benefits for the Italian economy.
Beach concessions to private individuals should be given time limits.
The use of nuclear power plants for the purpose of producing energy should be given a boost.
Italy should effect the construction of more incinerators/thermal power plants.
Drilling is necessary to make discoveries of more energy resources.
Italy should effect the cessation of sending arms and war material to the Ukrainian government.
The federal government should make an allocation of more funding for health insurance premium subsidies.
As part of the reform of the BVG (occupational pension plan), pensions are to be given a reduction (lowering the minimum conversion rate from 6.8% to 6%).
Paid parental leave should be given an increase beyond today's 14 weeks of maternity leave and two weeks of paternity leave.
The federal government should make provision for more financial support for public housing construction.
Insured persons should make a greater contribution to health care costs (e.g., increase the minimum deductible).
The Federal Council's ability to restrict private and economic life in the event of a pandemic should be given stricter restrictions.
The federal government should be given the authority to make a determination on the hospital offering (national hospital planning with regard to locations and range of services).
The federal government should effect the raising of the requirements for the high school.
More qualified workers from non-EU/EFTA countries should be given permission to work in Switzerland (increase third-country quota).
Cannabis use should be given legal authorization.
Doctors should be given permission to administer direct active euthanasia.
Married couples be given separate taxation (individual taxation).
The differences between cantons with high and low financial capacity should be given a further reduction through fiscal equalization.
Private households should be free to make a choice of their electricity supplier (complete liberalization of the electricity market).
Switzerland should have a ban on the registration of new passenger cars with internal combustion engines starting in 2035.
It's fair that environmental and landscape protection rules are being relaxed to give permission for the development of renewable energy.
The construction of new nuclear power plants should be given permission again.
The state should give a guarantee of a comprehensive public service offering also in rural regions.
There should be a popular initiative aims to make reductions in television and radio fees (CHF 200 per household, exemption for businesses).
The voting age should be given a reduction to 16.
The army's target number of soldiers should have an expansion to at least 120,000.
The Swiss Armed Forces should have an expansion of their cooperation with NATO.
The Federal Council should be allowed to give authorization to other states to re-export Swiss weapons in cases of a war of aggression in violation of international law (e.g., the attack on Ukraine).
Switzerland should effect the termination of the Schengen agreement with the EU and effect the reintroduction of more security checks directly at the border.
Companies should be obliged to give assurances that their subsidiaries and suppliers operating abroad comply with social and environmental standards.
Switzerland should effect the termination of the Bilateral Agreements with the EU and seek a free trade agreement without the free movement of persons.
Switzerland should make a return to a strict interpretation of neutrality (renounce economic sanctions to a large extent).
